message:
refactor: Split builtins.zig into specialized submodules

Extract functions from 3018-line builtins.zig into focused modules:
- builtins/pow.zig: PyPowResult, pyPow (111 lines)
- builtins/repr.zig: PyBytes, bytesRepr, stringRepr, tupleRepr, pyRepr, pyStr (394 lines)
- builtins/iterators.zig: range, enumerate, zip, iter, next, RangeIterator, StringIterator (326 lines)
- builtins/aggregates.zig: all, any, sum, min, max, sorted, reversed, filterTruthy (277 lines)
- builtins/conversion.zig: hex, oct, bin, intWithBase, round, bankersRound (208 lines)
- builtins/io.zig: print, input, breakpoint (106 lines)

Main builtins.zig reduced to 677 lines with re-exports from submodules.
Total: 2099 lines (reduced from 3018, ~30% reduction through deduplication).
